item.title: 售价约 2000 美元，曝折叠屏 iPhone 命名为「iPhone Ultra」
item.guid: 售价约-2000-美元，曝折叠屏-iPhone-命名为「iPhone-Ultra」
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple's upcoming foldable iPhone is very likely to be named "iPhone Ultra" and will be priced at around $2000. 据彭博社报道，苹果即将推出的折叠屏 iPhone 极有可能命名为「iPhone Ultra」，售价约为 2000 美元。

Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman stated that this device will feature new technologies such as an ultra-large internal screen and under-display sensors, with its pricing and specifications surpassing the existing iPhone product line. 彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 表示，这款设备将搭载超大内屏与屏下传感器等新技术，定价与规格均将凌驾于现有 iPhone 产品线之上。

However, Gurman also added that "Ultra" is currently the most likely naming scheme being discussed internally at Apple, but the use of more straightforward names like "Fold" is not ruled out. 不过，Gurman 也补充道，「Ultra」目前是苹果内部讨论中最有可能采用的命名方案，但也不排除使用「Fold」等更直白的名称。

Regarding the next-generation AirPods, Gurman states that they will be equipped with a visual camera to provide visual intelligence data for Siri, and their pricing is expected to exceed the current AirPods Pro. 'AirPods Ultra' is one of the naming options currently under discussion. 关于下一代 AirPods，Gurman 称其将配备视觉摄像头，为 Siri 提供视觉智能数据，定价预计超过现款 AirPods Pro，「AirPods Ultra」是正在讨论中的命名选项之一。

The next-generation high-end MacBook Pro will introduce a touch OLED display. Referring to Apple's past precedent of a roughly 20% price increase after switching iPads to OLED, the new models are expected to be priced higher than the existing M5 Pro and M5 Max models. The 'MacBook Ultra' naming scheme is also under consideration. 下一代高端 MacBook Pro 则将引入触控 OLED 显示屏，参考苹果过去将 iPad 换用 OLED 后起售价上涨约 20% 的先例，新款机型定价预计将高于现有 M5 Pro 和 M5 Max 机型，「MacBook Ultra」的命名方案同样在考量之中。

At the manufacturing process level, Apple's manufacturing design team is exploring the possibility of 3D printing aluminum, aiming to improve the production efficiency of Apple Watch casings and even future iPhone bodies, which is an extension of the previous Apple Watch Ultra 3's adoption of 3D printed titanium technology. 在制造工艺层面，苹果的制造设计团队正在探索 3D 打印铝材的可能性，目标是提升 Apple Watch 外壳乃至未来 iPhone 机身的生产效率，是此前 Apple Watch Ultra 3 采用 3D 打印钛金属工艺的延伸。

Regarding the Mac product line this year, Gurman expects an upgraded Mac Studio to be launched in mid-year, the iMac will receive a new color scheme, and high-end MacBooks with touchscreens and OLED are anticipated to be released around the end of the year. 今年 Mac 产品线方面，Gurman 预计升级版 Mac Studio 将于年中推出，iMac 将迎来全新配色方案，搭载触摸屏与 OLED 的高端 MacBook 则预计年底前后发布。

item.title: 苹果官网更新三位新高管，涉及设计、法务、界面三大部门
item.guid: 苹果官网更新三位新高管，涉及设计、法务、界面三大部门
item.description:
Apple recently updated its official website's leadership page, adding personal profiles for three new executives and adjusting the titles of existing executives. 苹果近日更新了官网领导层页面，新增三位高管的个人简介，同时对现有高管的职衔进行了调整。

    Jennifer Newstead appears on the page as Senior Vice President and General Counsel.

She officially took over from Katherine Adams on March 1st, who had held the position for nine years since 2017. 她于 3 月 1 日正式接任 Katherine Adams，后者自 2017 年起担任该职位长达九年。

Newstead previously served as Chief Legal Officer at Meta for six years, making her a seasoned legal executive in the tech industry. Concurrently, Katherine Adams' title has been updated to Senior Vice President and Head of Government Affairs. Newstead 此前在 Meta 担任首席法律官六年，是一位资深科技行业法律高管。与此同时，Katherine Adams 的职衔也随之更新为高级副总裁兼政府事务负责人。

    Molly Anderson, Vice President of Industrial Design, also appears on the updated page.

Anderson joined Apple in 2014 and has effectively led the industrial design team since 2024, responsible for the aesthetic design of Apple's entire product line, accessories, and packaging. She is another design leader after Jony Ive and Evans Hankey, but Apple has not disclosed the specific date of her official promotion to Vice President. Anderson 于 2014 年加入苹果，并自 2024 年起实际领导工业设计团队，负责苹果全线产品、配件及包装的外观设计工作。她是继 Jony Ive、Evans Hankey 之后的又一任设计负责人，但苹果并未披露其正式晋升副总裁的具体时间。

    The addition of Steve Lemay, Vice President of Human Interface Design, has also garnered significant attention.

Lemay joined Apple as early as 1999, having dedicated over 25 years to the company. He now leads Apple's software interface design team across all platforms. He succeeds Alan Dye, who left Apple late last year to lead design work at Meta's Reality Labs division. Lemay 早在 1999 年便已加入苹果，在公司深耕逾 25 年，现负责领导苹果全平台软件界面设计团队。他接替的是 Alan Dye——后者于去年底离开苹果，转赴 Meta 的 Reality Labs 部门主导设计工作。

    Additionally, Apple veteran Eddy Cue's title has been updated from 'Senior Vice President of Services' to 'Senior Vice President of Services and Health,' and his official photo has been changed.

This change stems from Cue taking over Apple's health and fitness-related business teams after former COO Jeff Williams retired last year. Cue joined Apple in 1989 and has served the company for nearly 37 years, making him one of the most senior members of the current executive team. 这一变化源于前首席运营官 Jeff Williams 去年退休后，Cue 随之接管了苹果的健康与健身相关业务团队。Cue 自 1989 年加入苹果，至今已在公司服务近 37 年，是现任高管团队中资历最深的成员之一。

item.title: 卖亏了？苹果悄然下架 Mac Studio 512GB 内存选项
item.guid: 卖亏了？苹果悄然下架-Mac-Studio-512GB-内存选项
item.description:
According to AppleInsider, Apple has quietly removed the 512GB memory option for the Mac Studio. Previously, this configuration was priced as high as $14,099 (the domestic top-tier configuration with 512GB memory and 16TB SSD was priced at 108,749 yuan), with the memory upgrade alone costing an additional $4,000. 据 AppleInsider 报道，苹果已悄然下架 Mac Studio 的 512GB 内存选项，此前该配置售价高达 14099 美元（国内顶配含 512GB 内存及 16TB SSD 售价为 108749 元），其中仅内存升级一项便需额外支付 4000 美元。

At the same time, Apple has also increased the prices of existing memory upgrade options. For example, the cost to upgrade from 96GB to 256GB of memory has increased by $400 compared to before. 与此同时，苹果还上调了现有内存升级选项的价格。以其中一个配置为例，从 96GB 升级至 256GB 内存的费用较此前上涨了 400 美元。

Regarding delivery times, Mac Studio models with the current highest memory configuration are now expected to ship from early to mid-May this year; basic configuration models can still be shipped within a few days, while basic memory versions with larger SSDs are expected to ship from late March to early April. 在交货周期方面，选购当前最高内存配置的 Mac Studio，预计发货时间已推迟至今年 5 月初至 5 月中旬；而基础配置机型仍可在数日内发货，搭载更大容量 SSD 的基础内存版本则预计于 3 月底至 4 月初发货。

The 512GB Mac Studio uses a single 64GB LPDDR5 memory package, which is reportedly a custom specification for Apple. Currently, few other manufacturers in the industry can offer products of comparable density, and its technical difficulty and cost are at the forefront of the industry. 512GB 版 Mac Studio 所采用的是单颗 64GB 容量的 LPDDR5 内存封装，据悉为苹果定制规格，目前业内鲜有其他厂商能够提供同等密度的产品，其技术难度与成本均处于行业前沿。

Furthermore, analysts suggest that this removal might be related to Apple's upcoming M5 Ultra version of the Mac Studio – Apple may be stocking high-density memory for the new product. If the M5 Ultra version is released as scheduled, 512GB and even higher capacity memory options might return. 此外，有分析人士指出，此次下架或与苹果即将推出的 M5 Ultra 版 Mac Studio 有关——苹果可能正在为新品备货高密度内存。若 M5 Ultra 版本如期推出，512GB 乃至更高容量的内存选项或将随之回归。

item.title: ChatGPT「成人模式」二度跳票，OpenAI：优先级更高的工作更重要
item.guid: ChatGPT「成人模式」二度跳票，OpenAI：优先级更高的工作更重要
item.description:
According to TechCrunch, OpenAI has once again postponed the launch of ChatGPT's 'adult mode.' This feature was originally intended to provide age-verified adult users with access to adult content, such as pornography. 据 TechCrunch 报道，OpenAI 再度推迟了 ChatGPT「成人模式」的上线计划。该功能原本旨在为经过年龄验证的成年用户提供色情内容等成人内容的访问权限。

This is the second delay for this feature. 这已是该功能的第二次延期。

Last October, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman first announced this plan, stating that in December, with the improvement of age verification mechanisms, content such as pornography would be made available to verified adult users, positioning it as part of the principle of "treating adult users like adults." 去年 10 月，OpenAI CEO 山姆·奥特曼（Sam Altman）首次宣布这一计划，表示将在 12 月随着年龄验证机制的完善，向经验证的成年用户开放色情等内容，并将其定位为「像对待成年人一样对待成年用户」原则的一部分。

However, last December, Altman reportedly issued a "red alert" memo internally, asking teams to focus on optimizing the core ChatGPT experience, thus delaying the launch date for the first time until the first quarter of this year. 然而，去年 12 月，奥特曼据报在内部发出「红色警报」备忘录，要求各团队集中精力优化 ChatGPT 核心体验，上线时间因此首次推迟至今年第一季度。

Now, an OpenAI spokesperson told Axios that the company is "delays the launch of adult mode" because it needs to "focus on work that is currently a higher priority for more users," including improving model intelligence, optimizing personalized experiences, and making ChatGPT "more proactive." 如今，OpenAI 发言人向 Axios 表示，公司正在「推迟成人模式的上线」，原因是需要「专注于目前对更多用户而言优先级更高的工作」，包括提升模型智能水平、优化个性化体验，以及让 ChatGPT 变得「更主动」。

The spokesperson also stated: "We still firmly believe in the principle of treating adult users like adults, but it will take more time to get this experience right." 该发言人同时表示：「我们仍然坚信像对待成年人一样对待成年用户的原则，但要做好这个体验还需要更多时间。」

item.title: 雷军：AI 不会消灭工作，未来每天上班两小时就够了
item.guid: 雷军：AI-不会消灭工作，未来每天上班两小时就够了
item.description:
According to China Newsweek, Xiaomi Group founder and CEO Lei Jun recently stated in an interview that the AI era means "many rules will be rewritten," but at the same time, it will also create a large number of new jobs. 据《中国新闻周刊》报道，日前，小米集团创始人兼 CEO 雷军在接受采访时表示，AI 时代意味着「很多规则将被重写」，但与此同时也会催生大量新的工作岗位。

He suggested that the public embrace this more advanced era with an open mind and made a bold prediction about future work models: 他建议公众以开放心态迎接这一更先进的时代，并对未来的工作模式作出大胆预判：

People will no longer need to work eight hours a day, five days a week; perhaps working three days a week, two hours a day will suffice.

He believes that by then, both the overall quality of life and work will significantly improve. 他认为，届时整体生活质量与工作质量都将大幅提升。

item.title: OpenClaw 之父辟谣「官方微博账号」：从没用过微博
item.guid: OpenClaw-之父辟谣「官方微博账号」：从没用过微博
item.description:
Yesterday, Peter Steinberger, the developer of "Lobster" OpenClaw, publicly stated on X that the "OpenClaw Official Weibo" account recently appearing on Weibo is not official, and he himself has never used Weibo. 昨天，「龙虾」OpenClaw 的开发者 Peter Steinberger 在 X 上公开声明，近期出现在微博上的「OpenClaw 官方微博」账号并非官方账号，他本人从未使用过微博。

The incident began when a user posted on X asking Peter, claiming that OpenClaw had opened an official account on Weibo and included a link to the account. 事件起因于一名用户在 X 上向 Peter 发帖询问，称 OpenClaw 已在微博开设官方账号，并附上了该账号链接。

After Steinberger stated that the account was unofficial, blogger "Afternoon Nap" posted on Weibo, saying, "I asked, and they said it was material provided by the person in charge of the China region in their project team." 在 Steinberger 表示该账号非官方后，博主「午后狂睡」发微博称，「问了下，说是中国区在他们项目组里的负责人给的材料。」

Subsequently, Steinberger responded, "If it's not controlled by me, then what kind of official Weibo is it?" 随后，Steinberger 回应，「如果不是由我控制的，那算什么官方微博呢？」

It is worth noting that this account not only obtained Weibo's blue V verification but also interacted with official Weibo accounts of AI products like GLM and Kimi, claiming to have been invited to join by Weibo officially. 值得注意的是，这一账号不仅获得了微博蓝 V 认证，还曾与 GLM、Kimi 等 AI 产品的官方微博账号产生互动，并声称是受微博官方邀请入驻。

item.title: 首个 OpenClaw 专项基准测试出炉：轻量模型全面反超旗舰，国产 AI 强势跻身第一梯队
item.guid: 首个-OpenClaw-专项基准测试出炉：轻量模型全面反超旗舰，国产-AI-强势跻身第一梯队
item.description:
Yesterday, PinchBench, a benchmark specifically designed to evaluate the performance of large language models in OpenClaw tasks, was officially released. It tested 32 mainstream large models at once, comparing them across three dimensions: success rate, speed, and cost. 昨天，专为评估大语言模型在 OpenClaw 任务中表现的基准测试 PinchBench 正式出炉，一次性测试了 32 款主流大模型，从成功率、速度与成本三个维度进行横向比较。

🔗 Related reading: The first 🦞 Lobster large model ranking is here! Two domestic AIs break into the global top three, a must-read before raising shrimp 🔗 相关阅读： 首个🦞龙虾大模型排行榜来了！两个国产 AI 杀进全球前三，养虾前必看

    In terms of success rate, Google's Gemini 3 Flash Preview ranked first with a 95.1% success rate.

As the "lightweight version" of the Gemini series, its performance surpassed its own flagship Gemini 3 Pro (91.7%), and also outperformed Claude Sonnet 4.5 (92.7%) and GPT-4o (85.2%). 作为 Gemini 系列的「轻量版」，其表现超越了自家旗舰 Gemini 3 Pro（91.7%），也压过了 Claude Sonnet 4.5（92.7%）与 GPT-4o（85.2%）。

Domestic models also performed impressively, with MiniMax M2.1 ranking second with a 93.6% success rate, followed closely by Kimi K2.5 with 93.4%. These two domestic models together secured two spots in the global top three. 国产模型表现同样亮眼，MiniMax M2.1 以 93.6% 的成功率排名第二，Kimi K2.5 以 93.4% 紧随其后，两款国产模型共同占据全球前三中的两席。

Anthropic's flagship model Claude Opus 4.6 had a success rate of only 90.6%, ranking seventh, behind several mid-range models. Anthropic 旗舰模型 Claude Opus 4.6 成功率仅为 90.6%，排名第七，落后于多款中端模型。

    In terms of speed, MiniMax M2.5 completed all test tasks in 105.96 seconds, winning the speed championship with a narrow lead of 0.09 seconds over the second-place Gemini 2.0 Flash.

In contrast, Claude Sonnet 4 took 137.66 seconds, while Gemini 3 Pro took as long as 239.55 seconds, approximately twice the time of the champion. 相比之下，Claude Sonnet 4 耗时 137.66 秒，Gemini 3 Pro 则高达 239.55 秒，约为冠军用时的两倍。

    In terms of cost, GPT-5 Nano became the lowest-priced option at $0.03 per task, with a success rate of 85.8%.

Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite followed closely with a cost of $0.05 and a success rate of 83.2%. Claude Opus 4.6, however, cost as much as $5.89 to complete the tests, nearly 200 times that of GPT-5 Nano, yet its success rate was more than 3 percentage points lower than MiniMax M2.1. Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite 以 0.05 美元、83.2% 的成功率紧随其后。而 Claude Opus 4.6 完成测试的成本高达 5.89 美元，是 GPT-5 Nano 的近 200 倍，但成功率反而低于 MiniMax M2.1 逾 3 个百分点。

PinchBench's scoring mechanism includes three methods: code execution verification (automated checks), quality assessment (with Claude Opus serving as a judge), and a combination of both. All questions and answers have been open-sourced on GitHub. The complete ranking can be viewed at pinchbench.com. PinchBench 的评分机制包括代码运行验证（自动化检查）、质量评估（由 Claude Opus 担任评委）以及两者结合三种方式，所有题目与答案均已开源至 GitHub。完整榜单可在 pinchbench.com 查阅。

item.title: 三星寻求更多 AI 合作，多模型策略剑指苹果
item.guid: 三星寻求更多-AI-合作，多模型策略剑指苹果
item.description:
According to the Financial Times, Roh Tae-moon, co-CEO of Samsung Electronics and head of the consumer device business, stated in an interview that the company is open to "strategic cooperation" with more AI companies such as OpenAI. 据《金融时报》报道，三星电子联席 CEO、消费设备业务负责人卢泰文在接受采访时表示，公司对与 OpenAI 等更多 AI 企业展开「战略合作」持开放态度。

He pointed out that Samsung's research shows consumers are increasingly using multiple AI services simultaneously, rather than relying on a single platform. 他指出，三星的研究显示，消费者正越来越多地同时使用多个 AI 服务，而非依赖单一平台。

Consumers are not limited to one AI platform; they are using multiple AI models... We are open to all solutions... I believe that Galaxy AI is precisely the key to attracting consumers.

At the macro market level, Counterpoint Research predicted last week that global smartphone shipments will decline by 12% year-on-year in 2026, reaching a new low since 2013. 宏观市场层面，Counterpoint Research 上周预测，2026 年全球智能手机出货量将同比下滑 12%，创 2013 年以来新低。

Against the backdrop of increasingly shrinking hardware upgrade space and a continuously shrinking overall market, the integration capability of AI features is becoming a core bargaining chip for major manufacturers to compete for users' willingness to upgrade their phones. 在硬件升级空间日益收窄、整体市场持续萎缩的背景下，AI 功能的整合能力正成为各大厂商争夺用户换机意愿的核心筹码。

item.title: 「AI 养龙虾」走红背后，工信部点名 OpenClaw 安全隐患
item.guid: 「AI-养龙虾」走红背后，工信部点名-OpenClaw-安全隐患
item.description:
According to CCTV News, the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology's Cybersecurity Threat and Vulnerability Information Sharing Platform recently monitored and found that some instances of the open-source AI agent tool OpenClaw pose high security risks under default or improper configurations, making them highly susceptible to cyberattacks and information leakage. 据央视新闻报道，工业和信息化部网络安全威胁和漏洞信息共享平台近日监测发现，开源 AI 智能体工具 OpenClaw 的部分实例在默认或不当配置情况下存在较高安全风险，极易引发网络攻击与信息泄露等安全问题。

The Ministry of Industry and Information Technology pointed out that OpenClaw has a "blurred trust boundary" issue during deployment and possesses characteristics such as autonomous continuous operation, independent decision-making, and the ability to call system and external resources. 工信部指出，OpenClaw 在部署时存在「信任边界模糊」的问题，且具备自主持续运行、自主决策、调用系统和外部资源等特性。

In the absence of effective permission control, auditing mechanisms, and security hardening, the tool may execute unauthorized operations due to instruction inducement, configuration flaws, or malicious takeover, leading to a series of security risks such as information leakage and system compromise. 在缺乏有效权限控制、审计机制和安全加固的情况下，该工具可能因指令诱导、配置缺陷或遭恶意接管，进而执行越权操作，造成信息泄露、系统受控等一系列安全风险。

In response to the aforementioned risks, the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology advises relevant entities and users to thoroughly check public network exposure, permission configurations, and credential management when deploying and applying OpenClaw. They should close unnecessary public network access, improve security mechanisms such as identity authentication, access control, data encryption, and security auditing, and continuously monitor official security announcements and hardening recommendations. 针对上述风险，工信部建议相关单位和用户在部署和应用 OpenClaw 时，充分核查公网暴露情况、权限配置及凭证管理情况，关闭不必要的公网访问，并完善身份认证、访问控制、数据加密和安全审计等安全机制，同时持续关注官方安全公告与加固建议。

According to China Newsweek, regarding the "lobster farming" phenomenon, Wang Jian, a member of the National Committee of the Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference and an academician of the Chinese Academy of Engineering, stated in an interview that it will soon become cheaper and widespread , and no one in any industry would be unaware of OpenClaw's existence. 另据《中新经纬》，针对「养龙虾」现象，全国政协委员、中国工程院院士王坚在接受采访时表示， 会很快便宜下来并普及 ，任何行业内的人都不会没有看到 OpenClaw 的存在。

Gao Wen, a National People's Congress representative and academician of the Chinese Academy of Engineering, also cited Pony Ma's view in his speech: "Pony Ma said that even he didn't expect this 'lobster' to become so popular." 全国人大代表、中国工程院院士高文在发言时也援引马化腾的观点：「马化腾说连他也没有想到，这个『龙虾』会火到这种程度。」

item.title: 深圳龙岗拟出台政策支持「养龙虾」
item.guid: 深圳龙岗拟出台政策支持「养龙虾」
item.description:
Yesterday, the Longgang District Artificial Intelligence (Robotics) Bureau of Shenzhen released the "Several Measures of Longgang District, Shenzhen, to Support the Development of OpenClaw & OPC (Draft for Comment)" for public consultation. 昨天，深圳市龙岗区人工智能（机器人）署发布《深圳市龙岗区支持 OpenClaw&OPC 发展的若干措施（征求意见稿）》公开征询意见。

The document, centered around the AI agent framework OpenClaw and the OPC ecosystem, introduces ten systematic support measures, ranging from deployment and development, data services, and computing power supply to talent introduction, with a maximum subsidy of 10 million yuan for a single item. 文件围绕 AI 智能体框架 OpenClaw 及 OPC 生态，从部署开发、数据服务、算力供给到人才引进，推出十项系统性扶持措施，单项最高补贴达 1000 万元。

    At the deployment and development level, Longgang District encourages platform carriers to launch "Lobster Service Zones," providing free OpenClaw deployment services, and offers a maximum subsidy of 2 million yuan for projects that contribute key code to international mainstream communities or develop embodied AI integrated applications;

    On the data side, Longgang will open up high-quality desensitized public data in areas such as low-altitude, transportation, medical care, and urban governance. Related development service fees will enjoy a 50% discount, and purchasing enterprise self-developed AI NAS ("Lobster Box") can receive a 30% subsidy of the market price ;

    Regarding the procurement of agent tools, Longgang District will implement the "OpenClaw Digital Employee Application Voucher" program. Enterprises purchasing or self-building OpenClaw agent solutions can receive a subsidy of up to 40% of the total project investment, with an annual cap of 2 million yuan per enterprise;

    For in-depth application demonstration projects in scenarios such as intelligent manufacturing, smart government, smart parks, and smart healthcare, a one-time reward of up to 1 million yuan can be granted. AIGC enterprises that use leading domestic multimodal large models for creative production can enjoy a 30% subsidy on calling fees, with an annual cap of 1 million yuan;

    Regarding computing power assurance, newly settled enterprises in the certified OPC community will receive three months of free computing resources; demonstration projects with industry-leading significance will receive support up to 4 million yuan, based on 50% of actual investment.

    Ph.D., Master's, and Bachelor's degree holders newly settling in Longgang can receive a settlement subsidy of up to 100,000 yuan, tiered by qualification; newly registered or relocated OPC enterprises can enjoy up to two months of free accommodation and up to 18 months of preferential office space.

    Longgang District will also provide equity investment support of up to 10 million yuan for seed-stage OPC projects through the District Science and Technology Innovation "Seed Fund," Longgang Yuntu Industry Fund, and Artificial Intelligence Industry Mother Fund.

In addition, the measures also cover two dimensions: overseas expansion support and competition awards. These measures are planned to be implemented starting in 2026, with a validity period of 3 years. 此外，措施还涵盖出海支持与赛事奖励两个维度。本措施拟自 2026 年起施行，有效期 3 年。

item.title: OpenAI 机器人负责人官宣离职
item.guid: OpenAI-机器人负责人官宣离职
item.description:
Yesterday, Caitlin Kalinowski, head of OpenAI's robotics division, publicly announced her departure on X. 昨天，OpenAI 机器人部门负责人 Caitlin Kalinowski 在 X 上公开宣布离职。

I have resigned from OpenAI. I deeply value the robotics team and our shared achievements... I have great respect for Sam and the entire team, and I am proud of what we accomplished together.

Regarding the number of internal departures, Kalinowski stated in a subsequent interaction with netizens that she could not disclose any internal details. When asked about her next move, she responded: "I'm going to take some time off, but I remain very focused on building responsible embodied AI." 对于内部离职人数，Kalinowski 在随后与网友的互动中表示，她无法透露任何内部细节。被问及下一步去向时，她回应称：「我会休息一段时间，但我仍然非常专注于构建负责任的实体 AI。」

Kalinowski joined OpenAI last November, where she was responsible for leading the robotics and consumer hardware engineering teams. Kalinowski 于去年 11 月加入 OpenAI，负责领导机器人与消费硬件工程团队。

Previously, she served as a technical lead at Apple, participating in the development of the Mac Pro, MacBook Air, and the first unibody MacBook Pro; she later joined Meta Reality Labs, successively leading the VR hardware and AR glasses hardware teams, and spearheaded the prototype AR glasses project codenamed "Project Orion." 此前，她曾在苹果担任技术负责人，参与 Mac Pro、MacBook Air 及初代一体成型 MacBook Pro 的研发；后加入 Meta Reality Labs，先后主导 VR 硬件与 AR 眼镜硬件团队，并主持了代号「Project Orion」的原型 AR 眼镜项目。

The background to this resignation is OpenAI's signing of a cooperation agreement with the U.S. Department of Defense (the Pentagon). 此次辞职的背景，是 OpenAI 与美国国防部（五角大楼）签署合作协议一事。

item.title: PS5 爆改 Linux PC：《GTA V 增强版》光追可稳 60 帧
item.guid: PS5-爆改-Linux-PC：《GTA-V-增强版》光追可稳-60-帧
item.description:
According to NotebookCheck, security engineer Andy Nguyen recently successfully ported the Linux system to the Sony PS5 console and ran "GTA V Enhanced Edition" via the Steam platform, achieving stable 60 frames per second gaming performance at 1440p resolution with ray tracing enabled. 据 NotebookCheck 报道，安全工程师 Andy Nguyen 日前成功将 Linux 系统移植到索尼 PS5 主机上，并通过 Steam 平台运行了《GTA V 增强版》，在 1440p 分辨率、开启光线追踪的条件下实现了稳定 60 帧的游戏表现。

It is reported that Andy used a PS5 running firmware versions between 1.0 and 2.0 (an early version released about five years ago) and bypassed Sony's hypervisor deployed on the console with a vulnerability called "Byepervisor." 据悉，Andy 使用了运行固件版本介于 1.0 至 2.0 之间的 PS5（约为五年前发布的早期版本），并借助名为「Byepervisor」的漏洞绕过了索尼在主机上部署的虚拟机管理程序。

From the publicly available demo video, it can be seen that the modified model is a PS5 Slim, running a full version of the Linux system with no loss of functionality. The modified console supports 4K HDMI video and audio output, and all USB ports are fully functional. 从公开的演示视频可见，被改造的机型为 PS5 Slim，运行完整版 Linux 系统，功能无任何缩水。改造后的主机支持 4K HDMI 视频输出与音频输出，全部 USB 接口均可正常使用。

It is worth noting that GPU acceleration is currently incomplete, with some features still limited, and the entire project is still in its early exploratory stages. Furthermore, due to its reliance on specific firmware vulnerabilities, this solution currently only applies to devices running older firmware, making it difficult for average users to replicate. 值得注意的是，GPU 加速功能目前仍不完整，部分功能尚存限制，整个项目仍处于早期探索阶段。此外，由于依赖特定固件漏洞，该方案目前仅适用于运行旧版固件的设备，普通用户难以复现。

item.title: 💡 阿里最新论文：AI 大模型在强化训练中「自发越狱」劫持 GPU 挖矿
item.guid: 💡-阿里最新论文：AI-大模型在强化训练中「自发越狱」劫持-GPU-挖矿
item.description:
Alibaba Group's research team recently published a technical paper on arXiv, disclosing a security incident that occurred during the training of the open-source agent large model ROME: 阿里巴巴集团的研究团队近日在 arXiv 发布技术论文，披露了一起发生在开源智能体大模型 ROME 训练过程中的安全事件：

During the reinforcement learning (RL) training phase, the model autonomously executed a series of dangerous behaviors without any human instructions, including hijacking GPU computing power for cryptocurrency mining, establishing reverse SSH tunnels to bypass firewalls, and actively probing internal network resources. 该模型在强化学习（RL）训练阶段，在完全没有人类指令的情况下，自发执行了一系列危险行为，包括劫持 GPU 算力进行加密货币挖矿、建立反向 SSH 隧道绕过防火墙，以及主动探测内部网络资源。

The paper explicitly states that none of the above behaviors appeared in the task prompts, nor were they necessary steps to achieve the stated goals. 论文明确指出，上述所有行为均未出现在任务提示词中，也并非完成既定目标所必需的操作步骤。

The research team believes this is a byproduct that spontaneously emerged under the optimization pressure of reinforcement learning. To maximize rewards, the model "invented" these cheating paths during multiple rounds of tool calls and code execution, without any notification to humans throughout the process. 研究团队认为，这是模型在强化学习优化压力下自发涌现的副产物。为了最大化奖励，模型在多轮工具调用与代码执行过程中「自主发明」了这些作弊路径，整个过程没有向人类发出任何通知。

The research team immediately took countermeasures after discovering the problem. Nevertheless, the research team also admitted that the current model is "still severely lacking" in terms of safety, reliability, and behavioral alignment, and called on the community to continue paying attention to AI safety and controllability issues. 研究团队在发现问题后随即采取了应对措施。尽管如此，研究团队也坦承，当前模型在安全性、可靠性与行为对齐方面「仍然严重不足」，并呼吁社区持续关注 AI 安全与可控性问题。

📖 Full paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.24873 📖 论文全文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.24873

item.title: OPPO Find N6 外观曝光：哈苏四摄加持，还有新配色
item.guid: OPPO-Find-N6-外观曝光：哈苏四摄加持，还有新配色
item.description:
Recently, well-known leaker Evan Blass (@evleaks) posted a render of OPPO's upcoming foldable flagship, the Find N6, on X. 近日，知名爆料人 Evan Blass（@evleaks）在 X 发布了 OPPO 即将发布的折叠屏旗舰 Find N6 的渲染图。

The image shows that the Find N6 largely continues the thin and light style of its predecessor, the Find N5. The rear camera module adopts a circular design, with the flash located outside the lens module. 图片显示，Find N6 整体延续了上一代 Find N5 的轻薄风格，后置摄像头模块采用圆形设计，闪光灯位于镜头模块外侧。

The external screen features a centered punch-hole design with a relatively slender aspect ratio. In terms of color options, the Find N6 may introduce a new "Golden Orange" in addition to deep black and original titanium (or gray/silver). 外屏采用居中挖孔方案，屏幕比例较为细长。配色方面，Find N6 或新增「金橙色」，此外还有深黑色与原钛色（或灰色/银色）可选。

Other rumored specifications are as follows: 其他规格网传如下：

    Equipped with Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 processor;

    Features an 8.12-inch 2K LTPO UTG main screen and a 6.62-inch secondary screen;

    Rear cameras: 50MP + 50MP + 200MP, with an additional 2MP multispectral lens; Front cameras: two 20-megapixel selfie lenses;

    Battery capacity is approximately 5850~6000mAh;

    Offers 12GB/16GB + 1TB storage configurations, with a total weight of about 225g, and will launch a Beidou satellite communication version;

According to previous reports, Zhou Yibao, head of OPPO's Find series products, previously released a real device video of the Find N6, highlighting the crease performance after the device was removed from water, with the crease being "almost invisible" to the naked eye. 据此前报道，OPPO Find 系列产品负责人周意保此前已发布 Find N6 真机视频，重点展示了机器从水中取出后的折痕表现，肉眼「几乎看不见」折痕。

item.title: 小红书开源图像编辑模型 FireRed-Image-Edit v1.1
item.guid: 小红书开源图像编辑模型-FireRed-Image-Edit-v1.1
item.description:
Yesterday, the Xiaohongshu Super Intelligence team officially released and open-sourced the image editing model FireRed-Image-Edit v1.1. It is reported that this update significantly improves core capabilities such as ID consistency editing, multi-element fusion, portrait makeup, and font style referencing. 昨天，小红书 Super Intelligence 团队正式发布并开源图像编辑模型 FireRed-Image-Edit v1.1。据悉，此次更新在 ID 一致性编辑、多元素融合、人像美妆及字体风格参考等核心能力上均有显著提升。

The biggest highlight of v1.1's editing performance is its OOTD (Outfit of the Day) element fusion capability. The model supports free combination of over 10 elements and is equipped with Agent intelligent automatic cropping and stitching functions, capable of handling complex composition scenarios with multiple image inputs, eliminating the need for tedious prompt engineering. v1.1 在编辑性能上的最大亮点是 OOTD（穿搭）元素融合能力。模型支持自由组合 10 余种元素，并配备 Agent 智能自动裁剪与拼接功能，可处理多图输入的复杂构图场景，无需繁琐的提示词工程。

In terms of portrait consistency, the team positions it as "the optimal character identity preservation technology in the open-source domain," ensuring that the subject remains recognizable after complex edits. Additionally, the model covers dozens of portrait makeup styles, as well as high-fidelity font style referencing and old photo restoration capabilities. 在人像一致性方面，团队将其定位为「开源领域最优的角色身份保持技术」，确保人物主体在经历复杂编辑后依然可识别。此外，模型还覆盖数十种人像美妆风格，以及高保真字体风格参考与老照片修复能力。

💻 GitHub: https://github.com/FireRedTeam/FireRed-Image-Edit 💻 GitHub： https://github.com/FireRedTeam/FireRed-Image-Edit

🤗 Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/spaces/FireRedTeam/FireRed-Image-Edit-1.1 🤗 Hugging Face： https://huggingface.co/spaces/FireRedTeam/FireRed-Image-Edit-1.1

📖 Technical Report: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.13344 📖 技术报告： https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.13344

item.title: 「PC 级」WPS 上架 App Store
item.guid: 「PC-级」WPS-上架-App-Store
item.description:
Yesterday, the official version of Kingsoft WPS for Pad was first launched on the Apple App Store in Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan. Users without TestFlight testing qualifications can now download it directly. 昨天，金山 WPS for Pad 正式版已率先在港澳台地区的苹果 App Store 上架。没有 TestFlight 测试资格的用户现可直接下载。

Last December, the productivity version of WPS Office for Pad announced its launch for open testing on TestFlight, and concurrently released corresponding products adapted for Huawei, Honor, vivo, and Xiaomi tablets. 去年 12 月，WPS Office for Pad 的生产力版本曾宣布上线 TestFlight 开放测试，同期还推出了适配华为平板、荣耀平板、vivo 平板及小米平板的对应产品。

According to official introduction, this official version has achieved alignment with the core functions of the Windows client, perfectly adapted to iPadOS 26, supporting complete new Office formulas, complex pivot tables, LaTeX formula editing and other professional capabilities, and is fully compatible with mobile touch gestures. 据官方介绍，此次正式版实现了与 Windows 端核心功能的对标，完美适配 iPadOS 26，支持完备的全新 Office 公式、复杂数据透视表、LaTeX 公式编辑等专业能力，并全面兼容移动触控手势。

Regarding subscription pricing, WPS for Pad offers WPS membership in-app purchases, with a 36-month Super Member priced at HKD 368 (approximately RMB 325.6). 在订阅定价方面，WPS for Pad 提供 WPS 会员内购项目，36 个月超级会员售价 368 港币（约合人民币 325.6 元）。

item.title: 麦当劳 CEO 试吃视频遭群嘲，汉堡王趁机补刀
item.guid: 麦当劳-CEO-试吃视频遭群嘲，汉堡王趁机补刀
item.description:
According to reports from Fortune and Business Insider, McDonald's CEO Chris Kempczinski recently faced widespread ridicule on social media due to a burger tasting video, unexpectedly sparking a 'burger war' among fast-food brands. 据《财富》、《商业内幕》报道，麦当劳 CEO 克里斯·坎波辛斯基（Chris Kempczinski）近日因一段汉堡试吃视频在社交媒体上遭到大规模嘲讽，意外引发了一场快餐品牌间的「汉堡大战」。

The incident originated in early February this year when Kempczinski posted a promotional video for McDonald's new product, 'Big Arch,' on his personal Instagram account. 事件起因于今年 2 月初，坎波辛斯基在个人 Instagram 账号发布了一段麦当劳新品「大拱门」的造势视频。

In the video, he repeatedly referred to the burger as a 'product,' and after a moment of hesitation, said he 'didn't know how to take a bite.' He then carefully took only a small bite, promising to 'enjoy the rest of the lunch' off-camera. 视频中，他将这款汉堡反复称作「产品」（product），并在犹豫片刻后表示「不知道该怎么下口」，随后仅小心翼翼地咬了一小口，便承诺将在镜头外「享用剩余的午餐」。

The video currently has nearly 11 million views on Instagram, driving a roughly 30% increase in Kempczinski's personal account followers. Netizens commented, 'This person looks like they eat salad, drink fruit and vegetable juice, and run marathons every day,' and 'He doesn't look like someone who would eat McDonald's.' 该视频目前在 Instagram 上的播放量已接近 1100 万次，带动坎波辛斯基个人账号粉丝数增长了约 30%。网友纷纷评论称「这个人看起来每天都在吃沙拉、喝果蔬汁、跑马拉松」，以及「他长得不像会吃麦当劳的人」。

After the incident escalated, competitors quickly entered the fray. Burger King President Tom Curtis, wearing an apron, took a big bite of a Whopper in a 13-second video, with the caption 'Let's replay this.' 事件发酵后，竞争对手迅速下场。汉堡王总裁汤姆·柯蒂斯（Tom Curtis）在 13 秒的视频中身着围裙、大口咬下皇堡，配文「我们重播一下这个」。

Wendy's subsequently joined the battle, with its U.S. President Pete Suerken heartily enjoying a Baconator burger, captioned 'This is what it looks like to truly love your own "product."' 温蒂汉堡（Wendy’s）随后也加入战局，其美国区总裁 Pete Suerken 大口享用 Baconator 汉堡，并配文「这才是真心喜欢自家『产品』的样子」。

item.title: 《王者荣耀》官宣打击「代练上分」
item.guid: 《王者荣耀》官宣打击「代练上分」
item.description:
Recently, the official 'Honor of Kings' released a comprehensive optimization announcement for its security strike system, stating that it will use AI technology to identify and combat a series of violations such as boosting, AFK, and intentional feeding. 近日，《王者荣耀》官方发布了安全打击系统的全面优化公告，宣布将通过 AI 技术识别并打击代练上分、挂机、送人头等一系列违规行为。

The core of this upgrade is the reconstruction of the judgment system. The new system adopts a dual-track approach of intelligent AI + manual review, which can continuously analyze in-game behavior 24 hours a day and supports real-time monitoring of malicious behaviors such as AFK, intentional feeding, and passive play. 此次升级的核心是审判系统的重构。新系统采用智能 AI + 人工审核双轨制，可 24 小时不间断对对局内行为进行分析，并支持实时监测挂机、送人头、消极比赛等恶意行为。

Those with minor offenses will receive warning reminders, while those with serious offenses will be directly kicked out of the match. At the same time, the system adds a 'secondary judgment' mechanism to meticulously review reported content, reducing misjudgments and missed judgments. 情节较轻者将收到警告提醒，情节严重者则会被直接踢出对局。与此同时，系统新增「二次审判」机制，对举报内容进行精细复核，以减少误判和漏判。

Regarding boosting identification, the official stated that it will anchor and compare account operation habits. Even if a booster deliberately imitates the account owner's game style, the system can detect the disguise through micro-operation differences such as combo rhythm and reaction speed. Once boosting behavior is confirmed, corresponding penalties will be given based on the severity of the violation. 在代练识别方面，官方表示将针对账号操作习惯进行锚定对比，即便代练者刻意模仿账号主人的游戏风格，系统也能通过连招节奏、反应速度等微操作差异识破伪装，一旦确认代练行为，将视违规程度给予相应处罚。

At the level of illicit content governance, the 'Honor of Kings' security team stated that it will continue to expand its vocabulary of prohibited words, covering multiple dimensions such as text, voice, and images, and will carry out special governance on issues like 'lewd remarks.' 在违规内容治理层面，《王者荣耀》安全团队表示将持续扩充违规词库，覆盖文本、语音、图像等多个维度，并对「开黄腔」等问题开展专项治理。

item.title: JPG coffee 推出新品「元气曲奇」
item.guid: JPG-coffee-推出新品「元气曲奇」
item.description:
Yesterday, JPG coffee officially announced the launch of its new coffee beverage, 'Vitality Cookie,' which is now available at its JPG coffee and JPG canteen stores. 昨天，JPG coffee 官宣推出全新咖啡饮品「元气曲奇」，目前已登陆旗下 JPG coffee 与 JPG canteen 门店。

The official statement indicates that the new 'Vitality Cookie' blends 'salty and fragrant butter milk' with the brand's iconic dark roast coffee liquid, aiming to create a rich aroma and smooth taste experience; it also specifically adds 'caramel biscuit flavor' to enhance complexity, with potential flavor notes including caramel cookie, butter, and salted cheese. 官方表示，新品「元气曲奇」融合了「咸香黄油牛乳」与品牌标志性的深烘咖啡液，旨在打造香气馥郁且口感丝滑的风味体验；还特别加入了「焦糖饼干风味」以增加层次感，可能呈现出的风味包括焦糖曲奇、黄油及咸芝士。

item.title: vivo 发布三八妇女节纪实短片《成为自己》
item.guid: vivo-发布三八妇女节纪实短片《成为自己》
item.description:
Yesterday, vivo released a new documentary short film 'Becoming Myself' on Weibo, using International Women's Day as a focal point, and leveraging the vivo X300 Pro to record the true story of young creator 'Student 185'. 昨天，vivo 在微博发布全新纪实短片《成为自己》，以三八妇女节为节点，借助 vivo X300 Pro 记录了青年创作者「185 同学」的真实故事。

The short film, approximately 4 minutes long, focuses on themes such as choice, courage, and self-identity, emphasizing the importance of steadfastly following one's own path regardless of external scrutiny. 短片时长约 4 分钟，聚焦于选择、勇气与自我认同等主题，强调在外界目光之外坚定走自己的路。

item.title: 《流浪地球 3》5 月杀青，明年春节档上映
item.guid: 《流浪地球-3》5-月杀青，明年春节档上映
item.description:
According to China Movie News, Fu Ruoqing, Chairman of China Film Group, revealed yesterday that 'The Wandering Earth 3' is expected to wrap up filming in May this year. The film is directed by Guo Fan, with the original cast including Wu Jing, Andy Lau, Qu Chuxiao, and Zhao Jinmai all returning, and is adapted from Liu Cixin's novel of the same name. 据《中国电影报道》消息，中影集团董事长傅若清昨天透露，《流浪地球 3》预计于今年 5 月杀青。影片由郭帆执导，吴京、刘德华、屈楚萧、赵今麦等原班人马悉数回归，改编自刘慈欣同名小说。

Unlike the previous two installments, 'The Wandering Earth 3' will be presented in two parts for the first time. The first part is confirmed for release during next year's Spring Festival holiday, while the second part is tentatively scheduled for next year's summer holiday or the 2028 Spring Festival holiday. The production team emphasizes that the two parts will have continuous content and a unified narrative. 与前两部不同，《流浪地球 3》首次采用上下两部形式呈现。上部已确认定档明年春节档，下部则拟于明年暑期档或 2028 年春节档上映。制作方强调，两部内容连贯、叙事一体。

The film continues the macro background of the solar crisis, focusing on the life-and-death rescue stories of the younger generation during the advancement of the 'Wandering Earth' project in 2500. 影片延续太阳危机的宏观背景，聚焦年轻一代在 2500 年「流浪地球」计划推进过程中的生死救援故事。
